info.description:
QDHub - Quantitative Data Hub Management System API
Provides metadata management, automatic table creation, data synchronization, and workflow orchestration.
info.title: QDHub API

get.description: Get concept theme heat for a trade date
Get concept rotation stats for a date range
Get stocks under a concept for a trade date
List concept themes with optional source filter

post.description: Execute a read-only SQL query (max_rows, timeout_seconds apply)

get.description: Get dragon-tiger (龙虎榜) list with optional trade_date/ts_code filter

post.description: Calculate factor values for given stocks and date range

get.description: Get financial indicators for a stock
Get financial reports for a stock
List market indices with optional market/category filter
Get daily/weekly/monthly K-line data for a stock
Get daily limit statistics for a date range
Get list of limit up or limit down stocks for a trade date
Get limit up comparison for today vs previous days
Get limit up ladder stats for a trade date
Get paginated limit up stock list for a trade date
Get main/net money flow for a trade date
List news with optional ts_code, category, date range
Get stock popularity rank by volume or other metric
Get limit up statistics by sector (industry/concept) for a trade date
Get limit up stocks for a specific sector on a trade date
List stocks with optional market/industry/list_status filter
Get basic information for a stock by ts_code
Get details of a specific API sync strategy by ID

put.description: Update details of a specific API sync strategy

delete.description: Delete a specific API sync strategy

post.description: Authenticate user and return access tokens

get.description: Get current authenticated user information

post.description: Refresh access token using refresh token
Register a new user account

get.description: Get a list of all registered data sources

post.description: Register a new data source with its connection details

get.description: Get details of a specific data source by ID

delete.description: Delete a data source and cascade to api_metadata, api_sync_strategies, api_categories, token. Admin only.

get.description: Get API categories. When has_apis_only=true, only categories that have at least one api_metadata are returned (for catalog dropdown).
get.summary: List API categories for a data source

parameters.description: If true, only return categories that have at least one API
parameters.name: has_apis_only

get.description: Get a paginated list of API metadata. Each item includes category_id. Optional filters: api_metadata_id, name, category_id.
get.summary: List API metadata for a data source

200.description: data: API metadata list with category_id; total, page, size

delete.description: Delete a single API metadata by ID. Admin only.

get.description: Get all API sync strategies for a data source

post.description: Create a new API sync strategy for a data source

get.description: Returns api_url and token for pre-filling the configure modal. Token is only included when present.
get.summary: Get data source config for edit

post.description: Trigger metadata crawl workflow for the data source. The workflow will fetch documentation from the data source's DocURL and parse it.

parameters.description: Request body (optional, workflow will fetch from DocURL)
parameters.name: request

get.description: Get token information for a data source (token value is not returned for security)

post.description: Set or update the authentication token for a data source

get.description: Check if data source has a token and validate it via adapter test request. No token returns unauthenticated; with token runs a test request and returns success or error detail.
Get a list of all configured data stores

post.description: Create a new quantitative data store configuration

get.description: Get details of a specific data store by ID

put.description: Update name, description, type, dsn, or storage_path of a data store

delete.description: Delete a data store. Fails if any sync plan references it.

post.description: Create tables for all APIs of a data source in the data store using the built-in create_tables workflow

get.description: Returns table names in the data store's database (e.g. main schema)
get.summary: List tables in a data store

get.description: Returns a page of rows from a table and total count. Query: page, page_size, q (search), search_column (optional)

parameters.description: Column to search in (omit for all)
parameters.name: search_column

post.description: Check whether the data store's database actually exists and is reachable

get.description: Get details of a specific sync execution

post.description: Cancel a running sync execution

get.description: Get a list of workflow instances, optionally filtered by status
Get details of a specific workflow instance

post.description: Cancel a running or paused workflow instance

get.description: Get the progress status of a workflow instance
Stream the progress status of a workflow instance via Server-Sent Events (SSE)
Get all task instances for a workflow instance
Get a list of all sync plans

post.description: Create a sync plan to synchronize data from APIs to a data store

get.description: Get details of a specific sync plan by ID

put.description: Update details of a specific sync plan

post.description: Disable a sync plan to stop scheduled execution
Enable a sync plan for scheduled execution
Manually trigger execution of a sync plan. Target DB path is resolved from the sync plan's associated data store. Request body may be empty; start_dt/end_dt are optional.

get.description: Get a list of all executions for a sync plan
Returns paginated execution history for the plan. Query: limit (default 20), offset (default 0).
Get aggregated progress of the latest execution for a sync plan
Stream aggregated progress of the latest execution for a sync plan via SSE

post.description: Resolve API dependencies for a sync plan

get.description: Returns the latest execution summary for the plan (status, record_count, synced_apis, skipped_apis). Null when the plan has never been executed.

post.description: Handle callback from workflow engine for sync execution (internal use)
